record.field:
{ "submission_time": .submission_time, "hh_is_household_head": .household_questions.household_head, "member_registered": .household_questions.member_registered, "head_registered": .household_questions.head_registered, "member_reference_id": .household_questions.member_reference_id, "relationship_with_head": .household_questions.relationship_with_head, "relationship_to_head": .household_questions.relationship_to_head, "is_psnp_user": .household_questions.is_psnp_user, "has_national_id": .national_id_section.national_id, "uid": .national_id_section.national_uid, "rid": .national_id_section.national_rid, "region": .basic_info.locale_info.region, "zone": .basic_info.locale_info.zone, "woreda": .basic_info.locale_info.woreda, "other_woreda": .basic_info.locale_info.other_woreda, "kebele": .basic_info.locale_info.kebele, "other_kebele": .basic_info.locale_info.other_kebele, "primary_Language": .basic_info.locale_info.language, "given_name": .basic_info.personal_info.first_name_english, "family_name": .basic_info.personal_info.father_name_english, "gf_name_eng": .basic_info.personal_info.grandfather_name_english, "name": (.basic_info.personal_info.first_name_english + " " + .basic_info.personal_info.father_name_english + " " + .basic_info.personal_info.grandfather_name_english | ascii_upcase), "first_name_amh": .basic_info.personal_info.first_name_amharic, "family_name_amh": .basic_info.personal_info.father_name_amharic, "gf_name_amh": .basic_info.personal_info.grandfather_name_amharic, "first_name_other": .basic_info.personal_info.first_name_other, "family_name_other": .basic_info.personal_info.father_name_other, "gf_name_other": .basic_info.personal_info.grandfather_name_other, "gender": .basic_info.personal_info.gender, "birthdate": .basic_info.personal_info.date_of_birth, "age": .basic_info.personal_info.age, "has_personal_phone": .basic_info.personal_info.phone_number, "phone_ids": (if .basic_info.personal_info.phone_number == "yes" then if .basic_info.personal_info.secondary_phone_number then [{"phone_no": .basic_info.personal_info.primary_phone_number, "phone_type": "primary"}, {"phone_no": .basic_info.personal_info.secondary_phone_number, "phone_type": "secondary"}] else [{"phone_no": .basic_info.personal_info.primary_phone_number, "phone_type": "primary"}] end else if .basic_info.personal_info.secondary_phone_number then [{"phone_no": .basic_info.personal_info.other_phone_number, "phone_type": "other"}, {"phone_no": .basic_info.personal_info.secondary_phone_number, "phone_type": "secondary"}] else [{"phone_no": .basic_info.personal_info.other_phone_number, "phone_type": "other"}] end end), "email": .basic_info.personal_info.email, "farming_type": .basic_info.personal_info.farming_type, "is_disabled": .basic_info.personal_info.disability, "martial_status": .socio_economic_data.marital_status, "education": .socio_economic_data.education_level, "hh_income_type": .socio_economic_data.income_source, "other_income_type": .socio_economic_data.other_income_source,
"size_of_family": .socio_economic_data.size_of_family, "number_of_children_in_family": .socio_economic_data.number_of_children_in_family, "number_of_males_in_family": .socio_economic_data.number_of_males_in_family, "number_of_females_in_family": .socio_economic_data.number_of_females_in_family,
"is_member_of_primary_cooperative": .membership.primary_cooperative, "primary_cooperatives": .membership.name_of_primary_cooperative, "other_primary_cooperative": .membership.other_primary_cooperative, "is_member_of_cooperative_union": .membership.coop_union, "cooperative_unions": .membership.name_of_union, "other_coop_union": .membership.other_coop_union, "is_member_in_farmer_cluster": .membership.farmer_cluster, "primary_commodity": .membership.primary_commodity, "role_in_farmer_cluster": .membership.farmer_role, "land_information_ids": .land_info.land_info_repeat, "crop_information_ids": .crop_information.crop_repeat, "crop_water_sources": .crop_information.crop_water_source, "livestock_information_ids": .livestock_info.livestock_repeat, "livestock_water_sources": .livestock_info.livestock_water_source, "do_you_use_fertilizer": .agricultural_input.fertilizer_utilized, "do_you_use_pesticide": .agricultural_input.pesticide_utilized, "do_you_use_insecticide": .agricultural_input.insecticide_utilized, "do_you_use_improved_seed": .agricultural_input.improved_seed_utilized, "access_to_machinery": .access_to_resource.machinery_access, "type_of_machinery": .access_to_resource.type_of_machinery, "finance_accesses": .access_to_finance.finance, "has_finance_access": .access_to_finance.finance_access, "is_farmer": "yes", "farmer_location": .farmer_location.location, "odk_reference_id": .farmer_reference_id_section.farmer_reference_id, "additional_farmers": (if .other_farmers_in_hh.other_farmers_in_hh_section.other_farmer_information == "yes" then .other_farmers_in_hh.other_farmers_repeat // [] | map({ "has_national_id": .hh_member_national_id_section.hh_member_national_id, "uid": .hh_member_national_id_section.hh_member_national_uid, "rid": .hh_member_national_id_section.hh_member_national_rid, "region": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_locale_info.hh_member_region, "zone": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_locale_info.hh_member_zone, "woreda": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_locale_info.hh_member_woreda, "other_woreda": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_locale_info.hh_member_other_woreda, "kebele": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_locale_info.hh_member_kebele, "other_kebele": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_locale_info.hh_member_other_kebele, "primary_Language": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_locale_info.hh_member_language, "given_name": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_first_name_english, "family_name": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_father_name_english, "gf_name_eng": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_grandfather_name_english, "name": (.hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_first_name_english + " " + .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_father_name_english + " " + .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_grandfather_name_english | ascii_upcase), "first_name_amh": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_first_name_amharic, "family_name_amh": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_father_name_amharic, "gf_name_amh": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_grandfather_name_amharic, "first_name_other": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_first_name_other, "family_name_other": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_father_name_other, "gf_name_other": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_grandfather_name_other, "gender": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_gender, "birthdate": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_date_of_birth, "age": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_age, "has_personal_phone": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_phone_number, "phone_ids": (if .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_phone_number == "yes" then if .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_secondary_phone_number then [{"phone_no": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_primary_phone_number, "phone_type": "primary"}, {"phone_no": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_secondary_phone_number, "phone_type": "secondary"}] else [{"phone_no": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_primary_phone_number, "phone_type": "primary"}] end else if .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_secondary_phone_number then [{"phone_no": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_other_phone_number, "phone_type": "other"}, {"phone_no": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_secondary_phone_number, "phone_type": "secondary"}] else [{"phone_no": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_other_phone_number, "phone_type": "other"}] end end), "email": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_email, "household_relationship": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_relationship, "farming_type": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_farming_type, "is_disabled": .hh_member_basic_info.hh_member_personal_info.hh_member_disability, "is_psnp_user": .hh_member_socio_economic_data.hh_member_is_psnp_user, "martial_status": .hh_member_socio_economic_data.hh_member_marital_status, "education": .hh_member_socio_economic_data.hh_member_education_level, "hh_income_type": .hh_member_socio_economic_data.hh_member_income_source, "other_income_type": .hh_member_socio_economic_data.hh_member_other_income_source,
"size_of_family": .socio_economic_data.hh_member_size_of_family, "number_of_children_in_family": .socio_economic_data.hh_member_number_of_children_in_family, "number_of_males_in_family": .socio_economic_data.hh_member_number_of_males_in_family, "number_of_females_in_family": .socio_economic_data.hh_member_number_of_females_in_family,
"is_member_of_primary_cooperative": .hh_member_membership.hh_member_primary_cooperative, "primary_cooperatives": .hh_member_membership.hh_member_name_of_primary_cooperative, "other_primary_cooperative": .hh_member_membership.hh_member_other_primary_cooperative, "is_member_of_cooperative_union": .hh_member_membership.hh_member_coop_union, "cooperative_unions": .hh_member_membership.hh_member_name_of_union, "other_coop_union": .hh_member_membership.hh_member_other_coop_union, "is_member_in_farmer_cluster": .hh_member_membership.hh_member_farmer_cluster, "primary_commodity": .hh_member_membership.hh_member_primary_commodity, "role_in_farmer_cluster": .hh_member_membership.hh_member_farmer_role, "land_information_ids": .hh_member_land_info.hh_member_land_info_repeat, "crop_information_ids": .hh_member_crop_information.hh_member_crop_details, "crop_water_sources": .hh_member_crop_information.hh_member_crop_water_source, "livestock_information_ids": .hh_member_livestock_info.hh_member_livestock_repeat, "livestock_water_sources": .hh_member_livestock_info.hh_member_livestock_water_source, "do_you_use_fertilizer": .hh_member_agricultural_input.hh_member_fertilizer_utilized, "do_you_use_pesticide": .hh_member_agricultural_input.hh_member_pesticide_utilized, "do_you_use_insecticide": .hh_member_agricultural_input.hh_member_insecticide_utilized, "do_you_use_improved_seed": .hh_member_agricultural_input.hh_member_improved_seed_utilized, "access_to_machinery": .hh_member_access_to_resource.hh_member_machinery_access, "type_of_machinery": .hh_member_access_to_resource.hh_member_type_of_machinery, "finance_accesses": .hh_member_access_to_finance.hh_member_finance, "has_finance_access": .hh_member_access_to_finance.hh_member_finance_access, "hh_is_household_head": "no", "is_farmer": "yes", "odk_reference_id": .hh_member_reference_id_section.hh_memeber_farmer_reference_id, }) else null end), "other_household_members": (if .other_hh_members.other_hh_members_yes_no == "yes" then .other_hh_members.other_hh_members_repeat // [] | map({ "name": .other_member_name_english, "name_amharic": .other_member_name_amharic, "name_other": .other_member_name_other, "gender": .member_gender, "household_relationship": .household_relationship, "birthdate": .member_dob, "hh_is_household_head": "no", "is_farmer": "no", }) else null end), "data_enumerator_name": .__system.submitterName, "data_enumerator_odk_id": .__system.submitterId, "data_enumerator_deviceid": .__system.deviceId, "odk_submission_date": .__system.submissionDate, }
